name: Iron Condor
description: Defined-risk neutral strategy: short strangle plus long wings for capped loss on Nifty monthly expiries.
hypothesis: Monthly Nifty range is bounded; selling body strikes and buying far OTM wings improves risk-adjusted returns vs naked strangle.

conditions: IV rank above 40 on monthly series
Short call at +1.5 SD, short put at -1.5 SD
Long call 100-200 points above short call, long put 100-200 points below short put
entry_rules.position_sizing: Max risk per condor = wing width minus net credit; size to 1% account risk

exit_rules.stop_loss: 2x net credit or 50% of max loss
exit_rules.time_exit: Close at 7 DTE if neither side threatened

risk_params.margin_required: Lower than naked strangle due to long wings

notes: Prefer monthly over weekly for Nifty. Adjust wing width based on VIX level.
